team.title: Team members
team.subtitle: Create username + password accounts so your staff can sign in to this dashboard.
team.ownerOnly: Only the store owner can manage team members.
team.empty: No team members yet. Create one below.
team.createDesc: Pick a unique username and password. Share them privately with your staff member.
team.usernameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, dot, dash, or underscore. 3-32 characters.
team.removeConfirm: Remove this member? They will lose access immediately.
dashboard.headline: Keep service quality visible before issues pile up.
dashboard.summaryBody: Monitor live demand, automation coverage, and setup readiness without bouncing between screens.
dashboard.refineAIDesc: Update tone, fallback, and behavior rules.
dashboard.reviewConversationsDesc: Check active threads and response quality.
dashboard.verifyPhoneDesc: Confirm the live WhatsApp number is set.
stats.activeConversationsDesc: Threads that still need attention right now.
stats.messagesTodayDesc: All customer and agent messages recorded since midnight.
stats.responseRateDesc: Coverage based on how many conversations received agent replies.
stats.responseRateNote: Higher is better for consistent automation
stats.knowledgeBaseDesc: Source items the bot can reference while replying.
stats.knowledgeBaseNoteFull: Keep this current as the product list changes
dashboard.noConversations: No customer conversations have been recorded yet.
dashboard.tightenWeakSpots: Tighten the weak spots before traffic grows
dashboard.allGood: Content, routing, and agent setup are all present. The next improvement is operational discipline: review conversation quality and keep the knowledge base current as the product list changes.
readiness.restaurantSetupDone: Base tenant configuration is in place.
readiness.aiAgentPending: Add an active agent before going live.
readiness.knowledgeBaseFull: source items are available to the bot.
readiness.knowledgeBaseEmpty: Seed FAQs, policies, or menu details for stronger answers.
readiness.whatsappPending: A live phone number still needs to be connected.
conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Review live customer threads for your store only.
restaurant.title: Store Settings
restaurant.subtitle: Manage the business identity and source data used by your tenant.
aiAgent.title: AI Agent Configuration
aiAgent.subtitle: Configure the live assistant that responds on your store's WhatsApp number.
knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.subtitle: Add policies, FAQs, and operational context that improves the live assistant.
menu.title: Product Management
menu.subtitle: Manage products manually or import them from a public product list URL.
